zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Stuteville IV於大約1116年出生在英國越可爾可廷加姆時，他的父親Robert de Stuteville III42歲，母親Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith38歲。他與Helwise de Murdac在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1186年在英國越可爾拉辛比享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Stuteville IV于大约1116年出生在英国越可爾可廷加姆时，他的父亲Robert de Stuteville III42岁，母亲Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith38岁。他与Helwise de Murdac在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1186年在英国越可爾拉辛比享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Stuteville IV was born about 1116, in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert de Stuteville III, was 42 and his mother, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, was 38. He married Helwise de Murdac in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1186, in Lazenby, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Stuteville IV est né environ 1116, à Cottingham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Stuteville III, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Helwise de Murdac à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1186, à Lazenby, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Stuteville IV um 1116 in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Stuteville III 42 und seine Mutter Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith 38. Er hat in England, United Kingdom Helwise de Murdac geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1186 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Lazenby, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Stuteville IV è nato il circa 1116 nel Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Stuteville III, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Helwise de Murdac nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1186, nel Lazenby, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Stuteville IVが約1116年にイギリスヨークシュアイアコッティンガムで生まれた時，父Robert de Stuteville IIIは42歳，母Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwithは38歳であった。イギリスイギリスでHelwise de Murdacと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1186年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラズエンビーで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Stuteville IV(이)가 대략 1116년 영국 요르크실르 컷잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Stuteville III(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith(은)는 38세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드에서 Helwise de Murdac(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1186년 영국 요르크실르 라비에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.East Riding, Yorkshire, England: Cleveland, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Stuteville IV nasceu aproximadamente 1116, em Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Stuteville III, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Helwise de Murdac em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1186, em Lazenby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Stuteville IV родился около 1116 г. в местности коттингхам, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Stuteville III было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Helwise de Murdac в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1186 г. в местности лазенби, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Stuteville IV nació aproximadamente 1116, en Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Stuteville III, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Helwise de Murdac en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1186, en Lazenby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
